generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft for position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionalDataTransmission
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox to measure transmission errors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionalDataTransmission
]

instance PositionalDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance ContextualDataTraces : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Contextual data traces from physical system sensors transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionalDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance SensorDataPoints : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated data points from physical system sensors transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PositionalDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance AnalyticalFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based analytical model for friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance DataDrivenFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data-driven friction model trained on operational data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance ExecutableSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable simulation model using MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Simulink
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system structure and behavior modeling across abstraction levels"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiveDataLinkingService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance ACME : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME Architecture Description Language for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiveDataLinkingService
]

instance AADL : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL for component and connector perspectives"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiveDataLinkingService
]

instance MontiArc : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc for architecture description and behavior modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiveDataLinkingService
]

instance Simulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation and code generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for behavior description"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance Java : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for behavior description"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance LiveDataLinkingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical and digital entities"
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Operational monitoring through dashboard interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Friction identification algorithms to optimize motion control processes"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight, RobotControlAdjustment
]

instance SynchronizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical and digital entities"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational monitoring data visualization"
]

instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Joint friction identification insights enabling data-driven decision-making"
]

instance RobotControlAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of robot control parameters to improve accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "MABI MAX 100 industrial robot system under study for machining operations"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearbox, MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearbox in MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin maintains real-time synchronization with the physical system through continuous ingestion of live sensor data streams, capturing time-series data at high temporal resolution to ensure an accurate and up-to-date digital representation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system employs a Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) architecture, integrating DataTrace, Processing, and Model components. It uses SysML for structural modeling and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized interoperability, enabling coordinated resource management and seamless integration of heterogeneous system elements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle stages involve Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) during the development phase, where modeling is split into distinct levels of abstraction: requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer. Methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT are used to manage complexity across these stages."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for data transmission between physical and digital components. No details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability mechanisms, or security protocols are provided in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems utilizes Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for standardized data exchange and MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming. The system interfaces with the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl robot controller to facilitate real-time control and data synchronization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML [17], AADL [24], ACME [23], MontiArc [25], [26], and integration with MathWorks Simulink [28] for model-based simulation and code generation."
]
